name: corpusgraph
description: Document ETL and entity relationship engine for AI agents. Converts 1,000+ unstructured and structured formats (PDFs, emails, Office, Parquet, ORC, JSON, CSV) into searchable, machine-readable data. Automatically extracts 30+ entity types and builds a relationship graph showing connections across your entire file corpus. Structured data normalization for tabular files. Built on the Ingestigate platform.
author: Ingestigate Inc.
